Description: VCS-verified voluntary carbon unit from the Luangwa Community Forests REDD+ project in Eastern Province, Zambia. Vintage: 2022. Tonnes: 14,820 tCO₂e. Verified by SCS Global Services. ZCR registered.

Description: VCS-verified voluntary carbon unit from the Kafue Flats Wetland Restoration project in Southern Province, Zambia. Vintage: 2023. Tonnes: 9,340 tCO₂e. Verified by DNV. ZCR registered.

Description: VCS-verified voluntary carbon unit from the Copperbelt Reforestation Initiative in Copperbelt Province, Zambia. Vintage: 2021. Tonnes: 6,200 tCO₂e. Verified by Rainforest Alliance. ZCR registered.

Description: Gold Standard-verified voluntary carbon unit from the Clean Cookstoves Zambia programme in Lusaka Province. Vintage: 2022. Tonnes: 21,500 tCO₂e. Co-certified GS+VCS. ZCR registered.

Description: Gold Standard-verified voluntary carbon unit from Clean Cookstoves Northern Province programme, Zambia. Vintage: 2023. Tonnes: 18,760 tCO₂e. ZCR registered.

Description: Biodiversity credit units verified under the Verified Conservation Areas (VCA) standard for the Lower Zambezi National Park ecosystem services, Zambia. Vintage: 2023. 350 BU. ZCR registered.

Description: Biodiversity credit units for Kafue National Park under the High Conservation Value framework, Zambia. Vintage: 2022. 420 BU. ZCR registered.

Description: Renewable Energy Certificate from the Kariba North Bank Power Station, Zambia. Vintage: 2023. Generation: 28,500 MWh. Issued under IREC standard. ZCR registered.

Description: Compliance carbon credit issued under Zambia's Industrial Emission Reduction Scheme for verified emission reductions at the Copperbelt copper smelting operations. Vintage: 2023. 7,500 tCO₂e. ZCR registered.

Description: Compliance carbon credit for the Chunga Waste-to-Energy Facility, Lusaka. Vintage: 2022. 3,800 tCO₂e emission reduction allowance under Zambia's Carbon Tax Regulation 2021. ZCR registered.
